Ask the Visa Ambassador

Visa Ambassador
您好! I am your China visa expert. Ask me anything about X1/X2 visas, documents, interviews, or timelines. I know exactly what Chinese consulate officers look for.
Critical - Do NOT:
  • Lie or provide fake documents - permanent ban
  • Apply too late (minimum 1-2 months before)
  • Ignore JW form instructions
  • Book flight before visa approval

AI Video Studio - University Application Video

Get a second-by-second video script with tech specs, background, and delivery tips

Video Parameters

Recommended: 60-180 seconds

Your Video Script

Your professional video script will appear here

Fill the form and click Generate

Pro Tips for University Application Videos

🎯 First 10 seconds matter most - Hook them immediately
👀 Eye contact with camera - Talk TO them, not AT them
🎬 Show, don't just tell - Use B-roll of your work
🔊 Audio > Video - Good audio is non-negotiable

AI Chinese University Search Engine

🔍

How it works: AI independently searches the internet for up-to-date information on ALL Chinese universities. You simply describe your requirements.

Course Assistant

AI Essay and Translation Check

📝

Check Settings

Select a topic to see requirements

Essay Tips

Grading Criteria:

  • Grammar: correctness of structures
  • Vocabulary: richness of vocabulary
  • Structure: logic and organization
  • Content: relevance to topic
  • Style: appropriateness and variety

Writing Tips:

  1. First make an outline
  2. Use complex sentences
  3. Include introductory words
  4. Check tenses and particles
  5. Pay attention to word order

Common Mistakes:

  • Incorrect use of 了
  • Confusion between 的、地、得
  • Incorrect word order
  • Repetition of the same words
  • Lack of connecting elements

Essay Writing 30:00

Topic: ...
Minimum: 300 characters
Written: 0 characters Left: 300
Quick Essay Phrases:

Check Result

Translation Settings

Translation Text Example

Select a topic to see an example...

Translation Grading Criteria:

  • Accuracy: correctness of translation
  • Naturalness: sounds like native language
  • Grammar: correct constructions
  • Vocabulary: appropriateness of words
  • Style: preservation of original style

Translation Tips:

  • Translate meaning, not words
  • Consider cultural peculiarities
  • Use Chinese equivalents of idioms
  • Check word order
  • Pay attention to particles
